text.title: rag-failure-taxonomy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for one rag-failure-taxonomy output, with valid and invalid examples.

example.code: { "incident_id": "inc-2026-05-22-017", "query": "What date did v0.4 ship?", "primary_label": "stale-doc", "evidence": "Retrieved chunk references v0.3 release notes; v0.4 release notes added two days after corpus snapshot.", "reviewer_id": "alice" }
example.note: Valid: closed label, evidence quote, reviewer id.
Invalid: missing query / evidence / reviewer_id; primary_label not in closed set.

text.reference: Validates an output file against this schema.
